status_legend.in_progress: 这个功能是当前唯一正在进行的任务。
status_legend.blocked: 因为已记录的阻塞问题，当前无法继续推进。
status_legend.passing: 要求的验证已经通过，并且证据已经记录。

features.title: 将user内容卡片和assistant内容卡片中的文字内容按markdown渲染呈现
features.user_visible_behavior: 将user内容卡片和assistant内容卡片中的文字内容按markdown渲染呈现
verification: user内容卡片和assistant内容卡片中的文字内容按markdown渲染呈现
单元测试，集成测试，e2e测试通过
evidence: src/ChatPanel.jsx: added renderMarkdown() function that uses window.marked.parse() + window.DOMPurify.sanitize() to convert markdown to safe HTML, applied to both user and assistant message bubbles via dangerouslySetInnerHTML
src/styles/components.chat-messages.css: added .chat-bubble-content styles for markdown elements (headings, lists, code, pre, blockquote, links, tables, hr, images)
src/index.html: added DOMPurify script tag for HTML sanitization
test/setup.js: added window.marked mock and window.DOMPurify sanitize pass-through mock
test/components/ChatPanelMarkdown.test.js: added 9 unit tests covering bold, italic, code, links, lists, headers, thinking+markdown, and bubble wrapper
test/e2e/app.e2e.markdown.test.js: added 7 e2e tests verifying bold, italic, code, links, headers, lists, and XSS protection
All unit tests pass (208, 37 suites), integration tests pass (26, 4 suites), e2e tests pass (7 new), eslint 0 warnings 0 errors

features.title: 优化e2e测试
features.user_visible_behavior: 使用多worker并行优化e2e测试时间；将e2e测试设置为遇到一个fail case后立即终止
verification: e2e测试遇到一个fail case后立即终止
单元测试，集成测试，e2e测试通过
evidence: playwright.config.js: workers changed from 1 to Math.min(4, os.cpus().length) for multi-worker parallel execution
playwright.config.js: maxFailures changed from 0 to 1 for fail-fast on first failure
E2E tests: 43 passed, 2 skipped (anthropic-config tests require env vars not set), ran in parallel across multiple workers
